What We Make

Our Specialities

Every product is custom-built to your exact measurements — raw aluminium strength with refined aesthetic finish.

🪟
Aluminium Windows
Sliding, casement & fixed windows. Weather-sealed, smooth-gliding, built to last with minimal maintenance.
Smooth Glide
🚪
Aluminium Doors
Swing, sliding & folding doors with glass panels. Strong frames for homes, shops and offices — stylish yet secure.
Secure & Stylish
🗄️
Aluminium Cabinets
Modular kitchens, wardrobes & storage. Termite-proof, rust-resistant, modern finishes.
Termite-Proof
🏗️
Partitions & Grills
Office glass partitions, decorative grills and curtain wall systems — polished and professional.
Custom Design
☀️
Pergolas & Roofing
Aluminium pergolas, canopies & roofing for balconies, terraces and commercial spaces. UV & rust resistant.
Weather Ready
✨
Custom Fabrication
Unique design in mind? We bring your vision to life — any shape, size or finish with full precision.
Any Shape & Size
Our Work

Photo Gallery

Why Choose Us

Built on Trust & Craft

We're not just fabricators — we're craftsmen who take pride in every millimetre. Your home deserves the very best.

01

Micrometer Precision

Every cut and join executed with pinpoint accuracy — flush, smooth and gap-free finish every time.

02

Aesthetic-First Design

Clean lines, modern profiles and premium finishes that elevate any space from ordinary to outstanding.

03

Honest, Affordable Pricing

Transparent quotes, no hidden costs. Premium quality at prices that respect your hard-earned money.

04

Local Roots, Trusted Name

A hometown workshop you can walk into, talk to, and trust. Built on community, driven by reputation.

500+
Happy Clients
How It Works

Our Simple 4-Step Process

1

Inquiry

Call, WhatsApp or fill our online form.

2

Site Visit

We visit, measure and suggest best design options.

3

Fabrication

Precision-crafted in our workshop with quality aluminium.

4

Installation

Delivered and installed at your site — clean and hassle-free.
